name: Jyske Invest Kinesiske Aktier KL
summary: Jyske Invest Kinesiske Aktier is an open ended equity mutual fund launched and managed by Jyske Invest Fund Management A/S. The fund primarily invests in the public equity markets of China. It seeks to invest in the stocks of companies operating across diversified sectors. Jyske Invest Kinesiske Aktier is domiciled in Denmark.
